known_values.description: Blast off with the SCREAMING BANSHEE—where every launch is a howl of excitement! Ignite your celebrations with the Miracle SCREAMING BANSHEE, the rocket that turns every sky into a symphony of adventure! With six assorted rockets packed in every case and a thrilling 10-second performance, each launch is a spectacle of howling tails and electrifying energy. Measuring an impressive 27-1/2" by 7/8", this rocket is designed for those who crave boldness and joy at their events. Whether you’re marking a milestone or simply lighting up the night, the SCREAMING BANSHEE delivers a breathtaking show that inspires awe and brings people together. Let your spirit soar and your dreams take flight—choose the rocket that promises unforgettable memories and a burst of inspiration with every shot. Don’t just celebrate, make your night miraculous!
